zh.Warrington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓
zh.Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾維根 哥吉拉 沙智
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Hindley於大約1242年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Baron Hugh de Hindley60歲，母親Beatrice Matilda de Middleton18歲。他於1287年與Elizabeth Culcheth在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年之後在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.Warrington, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓
zh-hans.Wigan All Saints, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾維根 哥吉拉 沙智
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Hindley于大约1242年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Baron Hugh de Hindley60岁，母亲Beatrice Matilda de Middleton18岁。他于1287年与Elizabeth Culcheth在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年之后在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hindley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Hindley (Lancashire) or possibly Hiendley (Yorkshire), both from Old English hind ‘hind, female deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Hindley was born about 1242, in Cheshire, England, his father, Baron Hugh de Hindley, was 60 and his mother, Beatrice Matilda de Middleton, was 18. He married Elizabeth Culcheth in 1287, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died after 1289, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Hindley est né environ 1242, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Baron Hugh de Hindley, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Matilda de Middleton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Culcheth en 1287, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1289, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Hindley um 1242 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Hugh de Hindley 60 und seine Mutter Beatrice Matilda de Middleton 18. Er hat 1287 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Culcheth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1289 in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Hindley è nato il circa 1242 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Baron Hugh de Hindley, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Matilda de Middleton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Culcheth nel 1287, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1289, nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Hindleyが約1242年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Baron Hugh de Hindleyは60歳，母Beatrice Matilda de Middletonは18歳であった。1287年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでElizabeth Culchethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年以後にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Hindley(이)가 대략 1242년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Hugh de Hindley(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Matilda de Middleton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Elizabeth Culcheth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Warrington, Lancashire, England: Warrington, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Hindley nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Hugh de Hindley, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Matilda de Middleton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Culcheth em 1287, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1289, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Hindley родился около 1242 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Hugh de Hindley было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Matilda de Middleton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Culcheth в 1287 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер после 1289 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1242–Aft 1289: e tusa o le 1242–ina ua ma'ea le 1289

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Hindley nació aproximadamente 1242, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron Hugh de Hindley, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Beatrice Matilda de Middleton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Culcheth en 1287, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió después de 1289, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
